decisions.recent:
# Atlas — decisions.md

_Append-only log of CIO verdicts. Newest at the bottom. One entry per verdict. Never edit a past entry — write a new entry if the view changes._

_Each verdict also has a full companion page under `wiki/decisions/<YYYY-MM-DD>-<slug>.md`. This file is the tail; the wiki page is the detail._

## Schema

```
### <YYYY-MM-DD> <ticker-or-theme> — <verdict>
Task: <task_id>
Driver: <one-line thesis or trigger that forced the verdict>
Sizing: <pre → post, if relevant>
Companion: wiki/decisions/<YYYY-MM-DD>-<slug>.md
```

Verdict values: `PASS` (take position / size up), `WATCH` (promote to watchlist / hold), `REJECT` (pass / trim / exit), `HOLD` (no change, thesis still valid).

---

## Log

_2026-04-17 — Atlas governance bootstrapped. No verdicts yet. First entries come after PARO 3 (seeding the three live positions with their existing thesis, sizing, and triggers)._

state.raw:
# Atlas — state.md

_Lightweight index into the wiki. What is live right now. Not bulk content — just pointers._

_Last updated: 2026-04-17 by initial seed._

## Book

Incrementum, Eduardo. Druckenmiller-style concentration. Three live positions + one hedge.

## Live positions

| Ticker | Role | Wiki page | Last reviewed | Status |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| BESI | High-conviction moonshot — advanced packaging / hybrid bonding for AI | [`wiki/positions/besi.md`](../wiki/positions/besi.md) | _pending seed_ | live |
| HII | Small defense/shipbuilding — US naval cycle | [`wiki/positions/hii.md`](../wiki/positions/hii.md) | _pending seed_ | live |
| AGQ | Silver hedge against macro-regime shift | [`wiki/positions/agq.md`](../wiki/positions/agq.md) | _pending seed_ | hedge |

_Seed note: sizing, stop, and kill-shot per-position to be filled by Eduardo at PARO 3 (agents_context/decisions.md seeding step)._

## Active watchlist

_To be seeded by Eduardo or by the first weekly review._

See [`wiki/watchlist/`](../wiki/watchlist/).

## Active themes

_Seed the first themes after the first briefing cycle:_

- _AI capex / advanced packaging_ — anchors BESI.
- _US defense cycle_ — anchors HII.
- _Sovereign credit / reserve regime_ — anchors AGQ.

See [`wiki/themes/`](../wiki/themes/).

## Macro regime snapshot

_To be seeded by the first macro page ingest._

See [`wiki/macro/`](../wiki/macro/).

## Open issues

See [`agents_context/issues.md`](./issues.md).

## Open contradictions

See [`agents_context/contradictions.md`](./contradictions.md).

## Most recent verdicts

See [`agents_context/decisions.md`](./decisions.md) (tail).

---

**Schema:** this file is a router, not a document. Never put prose or analysis here — put it in `wiki/`. This file exists so agents can orient in one screenful at session start.
